findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B does not exist — active sprint missing for 38 days
findings.detail: Every coordination file references SPRINT-2026-05-B as the promised follow-up to SPRINT-2026-05-A. No such file exists. The reconciliation commitment was made on 2026-05-21; as of 2026-06-28 that is 38 days with no active sprint document. Without it there is no canonical work queue, violating AGENTS.md §2 required reading order item 6 (SPRINT.md as work queue). Requires Sebastian/Esme decision on scope. Carried open from 2026-06-25 audit.
findings.fix_sketch: Create SPRINT-2026-05-B.md (or SPRINT-2026-06-A.md) with realistic scope. Requires Sebastian/Esme input on sprint goals.

findings.title: Retell R1 research 39 days overdue with 5 milestones blocked
findings.detail: ADR-0011 retains Retell pending Esme R1 confirmation. Q3 BLOCKING DECISION is now 39 days overdue (from 2026-05-20 SPRINT-A end). M-005, M-006, M-007, M-010, M-015 are all blocked. Q3 starts in 3 days (2026-07-01). Carried open from 2026-06-25 audit.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian must confirm Retell or commission ADR-0012. Add hard deadline in STATUS.md. Resolve before Q3 starts on 2026-07-01.

findings.title: STATUS.md overdue day counts stale (35/36 should be 38/39) and last_updated is 2026-06-25
findings.detail: STATUS.md 'In flight' section said 'As of 2026-06-25 (day 35 overdue)' for SPRINT-2026-05-B and 'Up next' said 'now 35 days overdue'. Retell R1 item said 'now 36 days overdue'. As of 2026-06-28: SPRINT-B overdue is 38 days (from 2026-05-21), Retell R1 is 39 days (from 2026-05-20). Footer 'Last updated: 2026-06-25' was also stale. Q3 countdown said '6 days away' but Q3 starts in 3 days.
findings.fix_sketch: Update SPRINT-B count to 38, Retell R1 count to 39, Q3 countdown to 3 days, refresh Last updated to 2026-06-28.

findings.title: KPI.md Q3 ACTION REQUIRED countdown stale (says 6 days, Q3 starts in 3 days)
findings.detail: KPI.md Q3 section ACTION REQUIRED banner said 'Q3 starts in 6 days' and 'Retell R1 research is 36 days overdue'. As of 2026-06-28, Q3 starts in 3 days and Retell R1 is 39 days overdue. Footer 'Last updated: 2026-06-25' was stale.
findings.fix_sketch: Update countdown from 6→3 days, Retell R1 count 36→39 days, refresh footer to 2026-06-28.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md Q3 blocking decision elapsed count stale (28+ days from 2026-06-17 note, should be 39 days from sprint end)
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Open Question Q3 said 'OVERDUE (28+ days)' with 'as of 2026-06-17 (28 days elapsed)'. As of 2026-06-28, the elapsed days from SPRINT-A end (2026-05-20) is 39 days. The 2026-06-17 timestamp in the note was also stale. Frontmatter last_updated said 2026-06-25.
findings.fix_sketch: Update Q3 note to '39 days elapsed as of 2026-06-28', sync frontmatter and footer to 2026-06-28.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section has no entry for 2026-06-28 nightly audit
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] most recent entry was '2026-06-25 — Nightly audit fixes'. Today's nightly audit (2026-06-28) found and fixed 3 COSMETIC findings. AGENTS.md §5 requires CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] to be updated on every spec change.
findings.fix_sketch: Add 2026-06-28 entry to [Unreleased] Changed section describing today's fixes.
